ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the player's account */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the player account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the player's last login */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the player registered */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the player resides */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the player's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Player biography */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_modes" (
  "game_mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game mode */,
  "mode_name" TEXT /* Name of the game mode */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the game mode */,
  "rules" TEXT /* Rules and guidelines for the game mode */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the game mode was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the game mode was last updated */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., multi-player, single-player) */,
  "min_players" INTEGER /* Minimum number of players required for the game mode */,
  "max_players" INTEGER /* Maximum number of players allowed for the game mode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game session */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who played the session */,
  "game_mode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game mode used in the session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the game session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the game session */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score achieved in the session */,
  "game_result" TEXT /* Result of the game session (e.g., game result data, win/lose status) */,
  "game_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the game session in seconds */,
  "replay_available" INTEGER /* Indicates whether a replay is available for the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_sessions_game_mode_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_mode_id") REFERENCES game_modes ("game_mode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_sessions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "high_scores" (
  "high_score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each high score entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who achieved the high score */,
  "game_mode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game mode in which the high score was achieved */,
  "high_score" INTEGER /* The highest score achieved by the player */,
  "date_achieved" TEXT /* Date the high score was achieved */,
  "score_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the high score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("high_score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_high_scores_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_high_scores_game_mode_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_mode_id") REFERENCES game_modes ("game_mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leaderboards" (
  "leaderboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leaderboard entry */,
  "game_mode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game mode for the leaderboard */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player in the leaderboard */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the player in the leaderboard */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score of the player in the leaderboard */,
  "date_achieved" TEXT /* Date the score was achieved */,
  "leaderboard_type" TEXT /* Type of leaderboard (e.g., daily, weekly, all-time) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leaderboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaderboards_game_mode_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_mode_id") REFERENCES game_modes ("game_mode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaderboards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who performed the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, logout, game start, game end) */,
  "activity_description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  "activity_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the activity */,
  "activity_result" TEXT /* Result of the activity (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_logs_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_mode_rules" (
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rule */,
  "game_mode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game mode the rule applies to */,
  "rule_number" INTEGER /* Number of the rule (e.g., Rule 1, Rule 2) */,
  "rule_description" TEXT /* Description of the rule */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the rule was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the rule was last updated */,
  "rule_type" TEXT /* Type of rule (e.g., gameplay, scoring, general) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_mode_rules_game_mode_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_mode_id") REFERENCES game_modes ("game_mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who earned the award */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "award_description" TEXT /* Description of the award */,
  "award_date" TEXT /* Date the award was earned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_session_replays" (
  "replay_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each replay */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game session being replayed */,
  "replay_data" TEXT /* Replay data (e.g., game state, player actions) */,
  "replay_date" TEXT /* Date the replay was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("replay_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_session_replays_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES game_sessions ("session_id")
)
